Audit: Enable table and column audit for all business fields.
Purpose: Normalized resource skill, certification, clearance, category, territory, facility feature, or capacity capability used by eligibility and requirement rules.
DynamicsAlignment: Maps to Field Service bookable resource characteristics, resource categories, territories, and proficiency/rating concepts while remaining product-owned and optional when Field Service is not installed.

Audit: Enable Dataverse audit and also enforce append-only CCSB audit semantics.
Purpose: Append-only product audit evidence for commands, validations, security decisions, confirmations, publishes, rollbacks, support reads, and integration transitions.
DynamicsAlignment: Complements Dataverse auditing and plug-in trace data with product-scoped operation, reason, policy, correlation, and before/after evidence.

Audit: Enable table and column audit; enforce append-only or state-forward-only transitions.
Purpose: Controlled ledger of proposed, committed, published, superseded, or rolled-back schedule mutations.
DynamicsAlignment: Maps to changes that would otherwise be made directly to bookings, assignments, or requirements in Field Service/Project Operations. CCSB keeps the ledger product-owned so all mutations flow through Custom APIs.

Audit: Enable audit; update/delete denied except system archive process.
Purpose: Immutable item-level evidence for every record/field included in a publish or rollback snapshot.
DynamicsAlignment: Complements ccsb_publishsnapshot header and avoids storing all official-state evidence only in a large JSON manifest. No direct Field Service table equivalent.

Audit: Enable audit; update allowed only through lock/unlock/override APIs.
Purpose: Protected scope that blocks or governs edits against official/published schedule state.
DynamicsAlignment: No direct URS table equivalent. This is CCSB's product-owned concurrency and release-governance lock, similar in spirit to approval/booking-status protection but explicit and queryable.

Audit: Enable audit for status and error fields; payload fields field-secured.
Purpose: Durable transactional outbox event reserved for integration, connector, export, notification, and downstream delivery after CCSB state commits.
DynamicsAlignment: Generic Dataverse/enterprise outbox pattern. V1 should persist events but keep delivery disabled unless a governed connector capability is activated.
